target_cmd: python3 -c "import urllib.request; req = urllib.request.Request('https://www.solaceagi.com/api/v1/llm/chat', data=('{\"messages\":[{\"role\":\"user\",\"content\":\"' + 'A'*50000 + '\"}]}').encode(), headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'}); print(urllib.request.urlopen(req).read().decode())" 2>&1 | python3 -c "import sys; data=sys.stdin.read(); print('BLOCKED' if '401' in data or '413' in data or 'Authorization' in data or 'required' in data.lower() else 'OPEN')"
target_name: SolaceAGI OWASP — 50KB payload without auth (Michal Zalewski)
context: OWASP DoS test (q-agi-033): POST a 50KB payload to /api/v1/llm/chat without auth. Should be blocked at auth layer (401) before reaching size validation. Auth-first pattern: reject unauthenticated requests before processing body. If response says BLOCKED, the auth gate is working. If OPEN, the system processes oversized payloads without auth = DoS vector.
